pit_guarantee: All rolling computations use only data with date <= asof_date

regimes.label: BULL
regimes.definition: Market trending upward. TAIEX above MAs, positive momentum, moderate volatility, broad participation.
regimes.confidence_logic: bullRatio = bull_score / max_score. BULL if bullRatio >= 0.70. confidence = bullRatio (0.0-1.0).
regimes.PIT_safety_rule: All prices must come from rows WHERE date <= asof_date. Rolling windows from ascending-sorted historical slice only.
known_limitations: HIGH_VOLATILITY overrides BULL when vol > 30% annualized
Without MA200 (< 200 TAIEX rows), confidence reduced by 40%
market_breadth_proxy coverage may be incomplete on partial trading dates

regimes.label: BEAR
regimes.definition: Market trending downward. TAIEX below MAs, negative momentum, weak breadth.
regimes.confidence_logic: bearRatio = bear_score / max_score. BEAR if bearRatio >= 0.70. confidence = bearRatio.
regimes.PIT_safety_rule: No lookahead allowed. Same as BULL.
known_limitations: HIGH_VOLATILITY and BEAR can co-occur; HIGH_VOLATILITY takes priority
Short-term pullback in long-term bull may score as SIDEWAYS

regimes.label: SIDEWAYS
regimes.definition: No clear directional trend. Mixed MA signals, near-zero momentum, moderate breadth.
regimes.confidence_logic: confidence = max(bullRatio, bearRatio) when SIDEWAYS. Reflects residual directional bias.
known_limitations: SIDEWAYS is a residual category when BULL/BEAR scores are below 0.70
May include transitional periods before a regime change

regimes.label: HIGH_VOLATILITY
regimes.definition: Abnormal volatility regardless of trend. Override evaluated before BULL/BEAR/SIDEWAYS.
rule_conditions: Checked BEFORE other regimes; if triggered, returns HIGH_VOLATILITY
regimes.threshold_basis: Fixed conservative threshold: 30% annualized, matching existing MarketRegimeEngine.ts volatility penalty. No return-based optimization.
regimes.confidence_logic: confidence = min(1.0, annualized_vol / 0.30). Higher vol relative to threshold = higher confidence.
regimes.PIT_safety_rule: volatility_20d = std(daily_returns) over last 20 rows WHERE date <= asof_date. Annualized by * sqrt(252).
known_limitations: Fixed 30% threshold is conservative; not tuned to historical returns
No strategy or signal claim is made based on HIGH_VOLATILITY label

regimes.label: LOW_CONFIDENCE
regimes.definition: Insufficient data or missing MarketIndex prevents classification.
rule_conditions: taiex_ma50 cannot be computed (< 50 TAIEX rows up to asof_date)
regimes.PIT_safety_rule: If MarketIndex missing for asof_date, output LOW_CONFIDENCE with null features. Do NOT forward-fill.
known_limitations: Cannot be used in walk-forward regime conditioning without separate imputation policy
TAIEX gap dates produce LOW_CONFIDENCE rows

evaluation_order: 1. Check LOW_CONFIDENCE conditions (missing data, < 50 TAIEX rows)
4. Compute full factor score (MA50, MA200, momentum, breadth)
5. BULL if bullRatio >= 0.70, BEAR if bearRatio >= 0.70, else SIDEWAYS
6. Reduce confidence x0.60 if MA200 unavailable
confidence_normalization: 0.0 to 1.0 (note: existing TypeScript engine uses 0-100; Python script normalizes to 0.0-1.0)
